allow: Bash(node -e "const d=JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('/dev/stdin','utf8'\)\); console.log\('Repo exists:', d.name, '| Stars:', d.stargazers_count\)")
Bash(node -e "const d=JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('/dev/stdin','utf8'\)\); console.log\('Private:', d.private, '| Has pages:', d.has_pages\);")

Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{const r=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('Latest:', r[0]?.commit?.message||'N/A', '|', r[0]?.sha?.substring\(0,7\)||'N/A'\)}\)")

Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{try{const r=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('Latest commit:', r.sha?.substring\(0,7\), '|', r.commit?.message\)}catch\(e\){console.log\('Error:', d.substring\(0,200\)\)}}\)")

Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{try{const r=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('Latest:', r[0]?.sha?.substring\(0,7\), r[0]?.commit?.message?.substring\(0,50\)\)}catch\(e\){console.log\('Raw:', d.substring\(0,300\)\)}}\)")
